lessons.title: Hello & ABC
lessons.topic: Greetings and the sound of A

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do we say when we leave someone?
questions.hint: It's a word for saying goodbye.

questions.question_text: Which of these is a type of fruit?
questions.hint: It's red and keeps the doctor away!

questions.question_text: What sound do you hear at the beginning of an airplane?
questions.hint: It's like saying 'A' in the word 'airplane'.

items.example: I am saying hello to you.

steps.title: Ben's School Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Ben. This is my teacher. I have an apple. Hello, Teacher!

questions.question: Who is Ben saying hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have' to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Anna. This is my teacher. I have an apple for her.

steps.prompt: Say: Hello, I am a teacher.

questions.question_text: I ___ a student. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'apple'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: An apple starts with the sound 'A'.
What do we say to our teacher to say 'hi'? (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: Morning & Pets
lessons.topic: Daily Greetings and sounds of B and C

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who brings an apple for the teacher?
questions.hint: This person is small and ready to learn.

questions.question_text: What does the bird say in the video?
What does the teacher do in the video?
questions.hint: It's a friendly gesture you do with your hand.

steps.title: My Fun Morning
steps.text: Good morning! I am happy. I have a blue ball. This is my cat. Hello, Cat!

questions.question: Who does he say hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' for things you look at.

steps.audio_text: Hello, this is my big, brown bear. I am fine today. What about you?

questions.question_text: I have a ___ cat. (Grammar question)
Which word means 'a round toy'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: We use 'Good night' in the morning.
What sound does the letter 'B' make?
In the morning, we say ___.

lessons.title: My Friend
lessons.topic: Identity and sounds of D and E

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal makes a buzzing sound and loves flowers?
Which pet loves to play fetch and says 'woof'?
questions.hint: It wags its tail when happy.

questions.question_text: Which big black and white animal loves bamboo?

items.example: I have an egg to eat.

steps.title: My Special Day
steps.text: This is Emma. She is a girl. Emma has a pet dog. The dog is her friend. 'I have an egg for you,' she says.

questions.question: What does Emma have for the dog?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show things you own.

steps.audio_text: Hi! I am David. This is my friend Ella. We like to play with Ella's dog who loves his red egg.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which word is a type of animal? (Vocabulary question)
Fill in the blank: This is my ___. (Grammar pattern)
True or False: An egg can be called a friend. (Reading comprehension)
Which letter sounds like 'd' for dog? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Elephant'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'e' sound like in 'elephant'.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Cat'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'c' sound like in 'cat'.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'Apple'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'a' sound like in 'apple'.

steps.title: Anna's Garden
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. This is my garden. I have flowers and a bird. The bird sings.

questions.question: What does Anna have in her garden?

steps.audio_text: Hi, I'm Anna. I have a yellow umbrella. It's big and keeps me dry.

questions.question: Is Anna's umbrella big or small?

steps.prompt: Say: I am happy and this is my book.
steps.expected_text: i am happy and this is my book

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
This is my ___ car. (Choose the right word)
What color is the sky, usually?
